name: parallel runner: --concurrency 1 produces identical output to --no-parallel
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 1 --format json 2>par.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --no-parallel --format json 2>ser.json; diff par.json ser.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && echo 'eval(1)' > src/a.js && echo 'eval(2)' > src/b.js
